name: Delta-V
description: Analog dual-channel function generator. Per-channel Attack, Decay, Shape, Cycle, dedicated VCA with audio input, EOC output, and summed DC-coupled mix. Covers envelopes, LFOs into audio rate, slew, and mixing.

controls.name: Attack
controls.description: Envelope rise time. Drives the attack stage or the rising slope in Cycle mode.
controls.detail: Short to long · audio rate reachable with Cycle

controls.name: Decay
controls.description: Envelope fall time. Drives the decay stage or falling slope in Cycle mode.
controls.detail: Short to long · audio rate reachable with Cycle

controls.name: Shape
controls.description: Bends the slope curve from exponential through linear to logarithmic for both attack and decay stages.
controls.detail: CCW: expo · noon: linear · CW: log

controls.name: Level
controls.description: Output attenuverter for the envelope/LFO. Also sets amplitude when used as a mixer channel via Sum output.

controls.name: Cycle Switch
controls.description: Enables self-cycling. End-of-cycle triggers back into Trig, producing an LFO that reaches audio rate. Synced when Trig is patched.

controls.name: Link Switch
controls.description: Normals Trig 1 to Trig 2 so both channels fire from a single gate source.
controls.detail: On: CH 1 Trig drives CH 2 · Off: independent

inputs.name: TRIG 1 / TRIG 2
inputs.description: Gate/trigger input per channel. Fires the Attack-Decay envelope.
inputs.normalizedTo: CH 1 Trig when Link switch on (TRIG 2 only)

inputs.name: SLEW 1 / SLEW 2
inputs.description: Audio/CV input for slew-limiter mode. Signal is smoothed by Attack (rising) and Decay (falling) times.

inputs.name: VCA 1 / VCA 2
inputs.description: Audio or CV input to the per-channel VCA. Amplitude modulated by that channel's envelope/LFO.

outputs.name: OUT 1 / OUT 2
outputs.description: Envelope / LFO / slewed signal per channel, DC-coupled. Scaled by the Level attenuverter.

outputs.name: VCA 1 / VCA 2
outputs.description: Output of the per-channel VCA (VCA input × envelope/LFO).

outputs.name: EOC 1 / EOC 2
outputs.description: End-of-cycle trigger. Pulses at the end of each decay stage.

outputs.name: SUM
outputs.description: Summed DC-coupled mix of OUT 1 + OUT 2 via their Level attenuverters. Handles audio or CV.

behaviors.name: Cycle as audio-rate LFO
behaviors.description: Channel self-triggers into a continuous AD-shape oscillator. With short Attack/Decay, reaches audio rate and functions as a low-fi VCO whose waveform is reshaped by the Shape knob.

behaviors.name: Slew limiter
behaviors.description: The SLEW input passes signal through the channel's rise/fall processor. CV staircases become glides, gates become envelopes with independent attack/decay — a portamento or gate-to-envelope converter.

behaviors.name: Bipolar sum mixer
behaviors.description: SUM is a two-channel DC-coupled mixer with attenuverters per channel. Works on CV or audio — combine two LFOs, two envelopes, or use as a summing utility alongside the function generator duties.

behaviors.name: Linked dual envelope
behaviors.trigger: Link switch on + single gate at TRIG 1
behaviors.description: Both channels fire from one gate with independent shaping. Stack two envelopes with different times to build complex two-stage shapes from a single trigger.

behaviors.name: Self-patch feedback with EOC
behaviors.description: Chain end-of-cycle outputs to build sequenced envelope bursts, ratcheted patterns, or complex cycling shapes triggered by each other.

behaviors.name: Dedicated VCA per channel
behaviors.description: Each channel has an internal VCA that the envelope/LFO opens. Patches a full voice (gate → envelope → VCA output) into a single channel of Delta-V.

patchIdeas.name: Two-voice AD
patchIdeas.patch: Gate → TRIG 1 · VCO 1 → VCA 1 · second gate → TRIG 2 · VCO 2 → VCA 2 · two full voices with dedicated envelopes and VCAs in 10HP
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Attack short · Decay medium
* CH 2: Attack short · Decay long

VCO 1:

VCO 2:

- Gate 1 (Out) g> Delta-V (TRIG 1)
- Gate 2 (Out) g> Delta-V (TRIG 2)
- VCO 1 (Out) -> Delta-V (In VCA 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Delta-V (In VCA 2)
- Delta-V (Out VCA 1) -> Output (In L)
- Delta-V (Out VCA 2) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate cycling VCO
patchIdeas.patch: CH 1 Cycle ON · Attack/Decay short · Shape at noon · OUT 1 is a low-fi AD oscillator · V/Oct tracks roughly via Decay CV if patched
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Cycle ON
* CH 1: Attack very short
* CH 1: Decay very short

- Delta-V (OUT 1) -> Filter (In) // audio-rate cycling
- Delta-V (OUT 1) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Gate-to-glide converter
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch CV → SLEW 1 · Attack sets rise glide · Decay sets fall glide · OUT 1 is portamento-ed pitch CV
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Attack ~50ms
* CH 1: Decay ~50ms

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Delta-V (SLEW 1)
- Delta-V (OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct) // glide

patchIdeas.name: Linked complex envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Link ON · single gate → TRIG 1 · CH 1 fast AD + CH 2 slow AD · SUM = two-stage envelope for filter cutoff with bite + body
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* Link: ON
* CH 1: Attack short · Decay short
* CH 2: Attack medium · Decay long
* CH 1 Level: +80%
* CH 2 Level: +60%

- Gate (Out) g> Delta-V (TRIG 1)
- Delta-V (SUM) >> Filter (Cutoff) // bite + body

patchIdeas.name: Bouncing-ball envelope
patchIdeas.patch: CH 1 Cycle ON · CH 2 attenuverts OUT 1 into CH 1 Decay CV (via SLEW 2 hack or external attenuator) · fall time shortens each cycle like a decaying bounce
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Cycle ON
* CH 2 Level: moderate attenuation

- Delta-V (OUT 1) -> Delta-V (SLEW 2)
- Delta-V (OUT 2) >> Delta-V (TRIG 1) // feedback retrigger speeds up

patchIdeas.name: Dual LFO for stereo
patchIdeas.patch: Both channels Cycle ON at slow rates · slightly different Attack/Decay · OUT 1 → left pan CV · OUT 2 → right pan CV · drifting stereo motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Cycle ON · slow
* CH 2: Cycle ON · slightly slower

VCA L:

VCA R:

- Delta-V (OUT 1) >> VCA L (CV)
- Delta-V (OUT 2) >> VCA R (CV)

patchIdeas.name: EOC ratchet
patchIdeas.patch: Gate → TRIG 1 · CH 1 Cycle ON for a few bursts · EOC 1 → TRIG 2 · CH 2 fires a percussion envelope at each burst end
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Cycle ON short
* CH 2: Attack very short · Decay short

Drum:

- Delta-V (EOC 1) t> Delta-V (TRIG 2)
- Delta-V (OUT 2) >> Drum (Level) // ratcheted bursts

patchIdeas.name: Two-input mixer
patchIdeas.patch: Audio 1 → SLEW 1 (Attack/Decay at 0) · audio 2 → SLEW 2 · Levels set mix amounts · SUM output = summed audio · Delta-V doubles as a DC-coupled 2ch mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Delta-V:
* CH 1: Attack min · Decay min
* CH 2: Attack min · Decay min
* CH 1 Level: +70%
* CH 2 Level: -50%

Osc A:

Osc B:

- Osc A (Out) -> Delta-V (SLEW 1)
- Osc B (Out) -> Delta-V (SLEW 2)
- Delta-V (SUM) -> Output (In) // inverting mixer
